blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that the system notifies users to re-sign when terms are updated.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this requirement, such as system notifications to users or a mechanism for tracking updates to terms. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for re-signing when terms are updated.
gaps: No evidence of system notifications for re-signing when terms are updated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-signing notifications
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system notifies users to re-sign when terms are updated.
